About

I'am Hiren

I’m a Project Manager with 5 years of experience in the software industry, having grown from a hands-on developer into a role focused on leading teams and delivering impactful products. My journey through full-stack development gives me a strong technical foundation, enabling me to bridge the gap between business goals and technical execution effectively.

I specialize in managing end-to-end project delivery—planning scope, aligning stakeholders, guiding cross-functional teams, and ensuring timely, high-quality releases. I’m driven by building solutions that solve real problems, improve user experience, and scale reliably in production environments.

With a balance of technical insight and people-first leadership, I enjoy turning complex ideas into clear execution plans and helping teams perform at their best while delivering meaningful results.
